surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal /shipwright-adopt scaffolding + GitHub-Actions templates + shared convention-lock libs; no web/CLI end-user app surface. End-to-end verified by running the REAL generator as a subprocess (plugins/shipwright-adopt/tests/test_adopt_pipeline_subprocess.py::test_full_pipeline_e2e_via_subprocess), which asserts codeql.yml + AUTOMERGE_SETUP.md land with correct payloads.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 codeql template dormant + ${SHIPWRIGHT_CODEQL_LANGUAGES} placeholder + permissions floor + continue-on-error
AC2 codeql scaffolder renders per-profile langs; never-overwrite; reason codes (scaffolded/already_exists/no_codeql_for_profile/profile_unresolved); rendered output valid YAML + dormant
AC3 check-name matrix expansion (interpolate / no-name->job-id / no-ref->append-combo / multi-dim / include-exclude excluded) + dormant detection
AC3 if:-gated deploy jobs excluded from requireable + surfaced as conditional (review H1)
AC3 derived Required-Check names == deployed workflow names across all 3 profiles + KNOWN_WORKFLOWS drift-pin
AC4 AUTOMERGE_SETUP render: profile + table substituted, dormant-trap + signing-omit prose, dormant/active flags; scaffolder never-overwrite + no-workflow degenerate
AC5 orchestrator wiring (codeql after CI; AUTOMERGE doc LAST; reads real deployed files) via real generate_adoption_artifacts subprocess
AC5 SKILL.md + reference-doc cross-links resolve after edits
